title: Cookie Policy
heroImageAlt: A line of cookies on a wooden surface
intro: flyair.lk uses cookies and similar technologies to make the booking flow work, to remember your preferences, to keep your session secure, and — only with your consent — to help us understand and improve how the site is used.

sections.p:
Cookies are small text files placed on your device by a website you visit. They are widely used across the web to make sites function efficiently, to provide information to site owners, and to remember choices you have made.

This policy covers cookies and similar technologies (local storage, session storage, pixels, SDKs) that flyair.lk and its embedded service providers may set.

STRICTLY NECESSARY cookies are required for the site to operate — for example to maintain your search session, complete a payment, or protect against fraud. You cannot opt out of these and the site cannot function without them.

PREFERENCE cookies remember your choices, such as currency, language, recent searches and accessibility settings.

ANALYTICS cookies (used only with your consent) help us understand which routes are searched most, where users drop off in the booking flow, and how to improve the experience.

MARKETING cookies (used only with your consent) help us measure the performance of our campaigns and show you relevant deals on other sites.

Some pages embed third-party content such as Google Maps for our office locations, payment gateways for card processing, and WhatsApp for in-page chat. These services may set their own cookies governed by their own privacy notices.

We do not allow third-party advertisers to set cookies on flyair.lk for behavioural targeting.

On your first visit you will see a cookie banner where you can accept all, reject non-essential, or open settings to choose category-by-category. You can change your choices at any time from the link in the site footer.

Most browsers also let you block or delete cookies directly through their settings. Note that blocking strictly-necessary cookies may break the booking flow.

sections.h: How long cookies stay on your device
sections.p: Session cookies are deleted when you close your browser. Persistent cookies remain until they expire (typically 1 to 24 months) or until you delete them. You can review and delete cookies at any time from your browser settings.
We may update this policy when our cookie use changes or when applicable law evolves. The current version is always on this page with the date of the last review at the top.
If you would like more information about how we use cookies, please email info@flyair.lk or call 0788 788 788.
